titleStmt.title: SII 25.168: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 168. (A.R. No. 168 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.
This record begins with the king's praśasti, Puyal-vāyttu and the same is not continued further as in the records of Kulōttuṅga III.
The details of the date viz., 2nd year, Mithuṉa śu 9, Monday, Hasta are irregular. It may be assigned to 12th Century on palaeographical grounds.

It records a deed of agreement pertaining to the sale of lands (nilavilaippramāṇa-iśaivutīṭṭu) given by Kaḻukaṇdāl-nāyakattēvaṉ alias Ariyāṉ, his younger brother Andiyum Pagaḻumāḍuvāṉ, Kāḍaṉ and their sister Śivaṉamuḻudum-uḍaiyāḷ, her younger sister Selvāṇḍāḷ and their mother Maṉṟēṟi-ōlaganār to the Ādichaṇḍēśvara-dēvakaṉmis of the temple of Akkāḷīśvaram-uḍaiyār of Tirunaṟaiyūr alias Pañchavaṉmādēvichaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu and registers the sale of oru-mā araikkānik-kīḻ-mukkāliṉ-kīḻ mūṉṟu-mā lands made over to the deity as tirunāmattukkāṇi, for the price-value of 6000 aṉṟāḍu-naṟkāśu and against a surety (māttu) given by Nigaḻum-vēḷāṉ of Kāñchivāyil. The lands thus sold were once given as iṟaiyili to the deity by the sabhai of Tirunaṟaiyūr alias Pañchavaṉmādēvich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. Among the boundaries of the lands are mentioned Pavuttiramāṇikkavadi and Rājēndraśōḻaṉ-vāykkāl. Besides, the lands at Kulōttuṅganallūr, Rājarājamaṅgalam, Rājarāja Āṇḍanalūr and the tirunāmattukkāṇi lands of the deity Siddhīśvaram-uḍaiyār are said to have been included in the sale ones. Two others named Sōmaṉātha-paṇḍitaṉ and Māḷigai Kaḻakaṇḍār Śōḻaṉāyagam Irājēndraśōḻa Viḻupparāyaṉ are stated to have signed in the absence of the person who acted as surety for the deed. The price value of 6000 kāśu was entrusted to Tāḷattāl-āḍuvaraṅga-nāyagadēvaṉ. The record was engraved by Nāḍaṟipugaḻ-āchāri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyal vāyttu . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrācen=tira coḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu mituṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapa[kṣattu na]vamiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷa nāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūrāṉa pañcavaṉmātevicaturvvetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār Akkāḷiśvaramuṭaiyār koyil
Āticaṇṭeśvaratevakaṉmikaḷukku vaṭakarai vikkirama coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Iṉṉam paranāṭṭu kaṇṇaṅkuṭiyil kāṇiuṭaiya kaḻakaṇṭāl nāyakatevaṉāṉa tiyākamalai nāṭāḻvāṉ Ariyārum Ivaṉ tampi Antiyum pakalumāṭuvāṉum Ivarkaḷ tamaiyaṉkāṭaṉum Ivarkaḷ Uṭaṉ piṟantāḷ civaṉaimuḻutumuṭaiyāḷum Ivaḷ taṅkai celvāṇṭāḷum Ivarkaḷ mātāmaṉṟeṟi Olakanāru
m Ivvaṉaivom nilavilaippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu . Iṟṟai nāḷāl nāṅkaḷ Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu . Ittirunaṟaiyūrāṉa pañcavaṉmāteviccaturuppetimaṅkalattu sapaiyār Iṉṉāyaṉṉārkku Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa nilamāy nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta pavuttiramāṇikkavatikku kiḻakku
rācentira coḻaṉvākkālukku vaṭakku 4kū 2ñcatirattum (1/2)9 10 3 3m catirattum ku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kiḻpārkkellai terpo Āḷvi perumāḷ maṅkalattu Ālaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭākum kulottuṅkaṉallūril Aḻakaṉ vaṇṭuvārāpati nampi Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai rājarājarājarāja is expressed by abreviation.maṅkalattu nilam rājarāja Āṇṭānalur ku
ca maṭappuṟa nilattukkum mulaṅkuṭaiyān nilattukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Uṭaiyār cittiśvaramuṭaiyār tirunāmattukkāṇikku teṟkkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷ naṭavuḷpaṭṭa maraṅkaḷ mutaliya nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭuttu Eḻutiṉpaṭi mikutikkuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅka rūpāy Orumā (1/4) kiḻakku mukkāl kiḻakku Iṉ
nilam Araiye Orumāvaraiye Araikkāṇikkiḻ mukkāliṉ kiḻ muṉṟumāvum viṟṟukkuṭuttuk ko Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 6000 Ikkācu Āṟāyiramum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccelavaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇa Icaivu Iṭṭukkuṭuttom Inilattu tiṭalum meṉokkiṉa maramuki
ḻ nokkiṉa kiṇaṟu potuvum potātiyu maṟṟum Eyppeppaṭṭa Urimaikaḷum Akappaṭa viṟṟukkuṭutta Inta piramāṇa vilaippaṭi kācu Āṟāyiramum kāñcivāyiluṭaiyāṉ nikaḻam palaveḷāṉ kiḻppuṇaiyāka Eṉṟu vāṅki Ivar māṭṭu nāṅkaḷ paṟṟi nilavilaippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutto
m Uṭaiyār Akkāḷiśvaramuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇcaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukku kaḻukaṇṭāl nāyakat tevaṉāṉa tiyākamala nāṭāḻvaṉāṉa Ariyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi Antiyum pakalumāṭuvāṉum kāṭaṉum civaṉai muḻutuṭaiyāḷum cellāṇṭāḷum maṉṟeṟi Olakaṉārum Ivaṉaivom . Ivarkaḷ veṇṭikkoḷ
(ḷa) Inta naḷavalaiRead nilavilai •ppiramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭu EḻutiṇeRead eḻutiṉeṉ • Inta tirunaṟaiyūrāṉa pañcavaṉ māteviccaruppetimaṅkalattu pārttuvāci tiruviṇṇakar niṉṟāṉpaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ikkācu Āṟāyirattukkum Araiye Orumāvaraiye Araikkāṇikiḻ mukkāle muṉṟumāvum viṟṟuk kuṭuttamaikku nāyakattevaṉāṉa tiyākamalanāṭā
ḻvāṉ Ariyāṉum Ivaṉtampi Antiyum pakalum Āṭuvāṉum Ivarkaḷ tamaiyaṉ kāṭaṉum Ivarkaḷ taṅkai civaṉai muḻutu muṭaiyāḷum celvāṇṭāḷum Ivarkaḷ mātā maṉṟeṟi Olakiṉāḷum Imā kaimāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku comaṉāta paṇṭitaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ māḷikai kaḻakaṇṭār coḻanāyakam Irācentiracoḻa viḻupparāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ikkācu
1. Before this line the expressions svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakka[ra*]vattikaḷ

ṉ Ariyāruḷḷiṭṭār kaiyil kuṭuttamaikku Ippaṭi Aṟi kāñcivāyiluṭaiyāṉ maṇṭayāḻvāṉ celvaṉāṉa nikaḻam palaveḷāṉ kaimāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku Ivai Āṇṭā nallūr kiḻavaṉ Apayapukkaran Uṟṟa noytittāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Ittaṉmam kaṇṭu Eḻuttu veṭṭaṉeṉ nāṭāṟipukaḻ Ācāriy Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
